app_tagline: Private PDF Redaction,everything runs in your browser
hero_headline: Redact PDFs. Nothing leaves your device.
hero_tagline: AI detection. Reversible encryption. Timestamped audit trail.
hero_sub: BERT NER detects names, addresses, IBANs, health data, and more across 104 languages, entirely in your browser. Permanently flat redacted PDF. Encrypted vault to restore originals. Audit log for compliance. No server. No account.
drop_prompt: Drop a PDF here or click to select
drop_hint: Only PDF files. Nothing leaves your device.
analyse_regex: Scanning for emails, IBANs, phone numbers…
review_subtitle: Uncheck items you do not want redacted. Adjust the confidence slider to show more or fewer detections.
export_pdf_hint: Safe to share, all PII replaced with solid boxes
export_map_hint: Stores what was redacted. Useless without the .key file.
export_key_hint: Keep secret — needed to restore originals.
export_restore_hint: Drop your .bounds and .key files here or click to select
restore_subtitle: Decrypt your .bounds file to reveal the original PII values
restore_clarification: The redacted PDF has permanent black boxes. Bounds restores the original values, not the file. Use this log to reference what was hidden.
restore_error_invalid: Decryption failed,check you are using the matching .bounds and .key pair.
review_no_detections_page: No detections on page {page}. Check the highlighted pages.
review_no_detections_threshold: No detections above this confidence level.
review_clean_subtitle: This document appears clean. No personally identifiable information was found.
ai_model_info: AI models: BERT multilingual NER + Flan-T5 privacy summary · run entirely in your browser
ai_limitation: AI may miss some PII. Always review all detections before sharing.
options_footer_text: e.g. Redacted under GDPR Art. 17 · 29 March 2026
export_audit_hint: Machine-readable breakdown of redacted items, no document content
pii_what_intro: Any data that can identify a specific individual directly or indirectly, for example:
pii_what_context: Identifiability depends on context. A first name alone usually does not identify a person, but combined with an address, it might. Use your judgement.
pii_item_ahv: AHV / AVS number · Social Security number
review_ocr_failed_pages: OCR could not extract text from page
review_ocr_failed_pages_plural: OCR could not extract text from pages
review_ocr_add_hint: Use Add manually to mark any sensitive fields below.
risk_critical_desc: Highly sensitive, health or financial records
loading_never_leaves: Your document never leaves this tab
loading_verify_hint: Verify: open DevTools → Network → confirm no request body contains your filename
loading_model_mb: {downloaded} MB / 430 MB, downloading once, cached forever
loading_model_local: This model runs entirely in your browser, your file is never uploaded
about_tagline: On-device PII detection and redaction for legal, compliance, and healthcare teams. No files leave your browser — ever.
about_zero_network: Zero network requests. All AI inference runs locally via WebAssembly — verifiable in DevTools.
about_bert_stack: BERT multilingual NER · Tesseract OCR · face detection · 40+ regex patterns across 9 languages
about_reversible: Pages are rasterised on export — text layer destroyed, not covered. Reversible via AES-256-GCM encrypted vault.
about_annotations: Legal footer stamps and per-page annotations. Add redaction notes directly to the exported PDF.
about_audit: Signed audit report: risk score, PII breakdown by type, GDPR Art. 83 and FADP Art. 60 exposure mapping.
options_token_hint: Replaces each PII instance with a consistent token (e.g. [NAME_001]), preserves structure for audit trails and data mapping.
options_footer_hint: Printed at the bottom of every page. Useful for legal audit trails.
review_draw_hint: Click and drag on the PDF to draw a box
